Off Calendar Feb-11-2019 Continued To Mar-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Spielberg for Julia Cesareo Dempsey. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator ("SFPA").

Mr. Spielberg stated that the Bankruptcy court was not acting and that he could file a declaration from Julia stating that she was the only Heir. Mr. Ferdon suggested making the distribution to the Heir and stated that she was to turn it over to the bankruptcy Court. The Court found that Julia Cesareo Dempsey is the child of the Decedent, that she is entitled to heirship of the estate, that adoption does not sever the child/parent relationship and granted the petition, (subject to a written order).

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-12-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Joanthan Ferdon appeared for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA). Chris Kuhner appeared for the petitioner.

The Court appointed the SFPA as the adminstrator of the Estate of Michelle Cesareo. Mr. Ferdon is to submit an order.

Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Laura Martinez CSR#11332. Bailiff: Rich Lee. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-05-2007 Continued To Oct-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: CHRIS KUHNER, APPEARING FOR PETITIONER

THE COURT HAS QUESTIONS REGARDING THE BANKRUPTCY. THERE IS NO OPPOSITION TO THIS MATTER. GRANTED ORDER TO BE SUBNITTED BY COUNSEL. ATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.

JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN; REPORTER: KATY BERSAMIN,CSR#11722;CLERK: LARRISA DOTSON; BALIFFM. LOOS
